# INTENT

## User Request

Replace the current browser delete confirmation prompt with a cleaner custom modal and make it reusable for later confirmation flows.

## Requested Outcome

Use a proper in-app confirmation modal for project deletion instead of `window.confirm`, and implement it as a reusable component.

## Constraints

- Keep the first integration focused on project deletion.
- Make the modal generic enough for future destructive confirmations.
- Verification is required.

## Open Questions

- None for this slice.
